name: article_id
description: JuriCode-JP article unique ID, e.g. 'keihou-art-36'.

name: law_name_ja
description: Law name in Japanese (e.g. '刑法').

name: law_name_en
description: Law name in English (e.g. 'Penal Code'). May be null.

name: article_number
description: Article number as a string to preserve forms like '36-2'.

name: paragraph_number
description: Paragraph number (1-based). Null when chunk_type='article'.

name: chunk_type
description: Chunk granularity: 'article' or 'paragraph'.

name: text
description: The actual Japanese statutory text content (Markdown stripped).

name: source_url
description: e-Gov source URL for the law.

name: source_format
description: Origin format: 'e-gov-xml' / 'e-gov-html' / 'manual' / 'import-lawtext'.

name: version_date
description: Effective date of the current article text (ISO yyyy-mm-dd).

name: last_verified
description: Date the article was last cross-checked against the original.

name: license
description: License of this JuriCode-JP record (typically 'MIT').

name: translation_status
description: Translation status: 'official' / 'community' / 'draft' / 'none'.

name: tags
description: Topic tags (phase, law category, concept, procedure, stakeholder).

name: chunk_id
description: Unique chunk identifier. Equals article_id for chunk_type='article', or '<article_id>-p<N>' for chunk_type='paragraph'. Null only when source article_id is missing (data-quality signal).

name: char_count
description: Character count of the chunk text (Python len()). Useful for size budgeting before token counts are precise.

name: token_count
description: Token count of the chunk text. Method recorded in token_method. Use this to budget retrieval against the LLM context window.

name: token_method
description: How token_count was computed. 'tiktoken-o200k_base' (precise, used when tiktoken is installed) or 'char-based-fallback' (len(text)//2, used when tiktoken is unavailable). Treat token_count as approximate when this is 'char-based-fallback'.

name: has_cases
description: True iff the source article frontmatter declares one or more case-law links in its `cases:` list. Use as a fast retrieval filter when 'case-backed' authority is required.

name: case_count
description: Number of entries in the source article's `cases:` list. Counts raw entries listed (including any that lack case_id). 0 when there are no case links.

name: case_ids
description: Flattened list of case_id values from the source article's `cases:` list. Use as a join key against an external case-law index. May be shorter than case_count when some entries lack a case_id.
